ConsultationRequest.title: ConsultationRequest
ConsultationRequest.description: A request for a medical consultation regarding stem cell therapy.

contact.description: The contact number of the patient.

concernArea.description: The area of concern for the patient.

status.description: The current status of the patient's condition.

createdAt.description: The time the request was created.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created the request (if authenticated).
